title: 10-step budget ledger with a global conservation invariant
source: A 10-step CLI provenance chain that threads a global budget invariant: requests are granted against the running remainder across steps 2..9 and reconciled at step 10. The trap is cumulative state — a step that re-derives the budget locally (ignoring prior commitments) overdraws and breaks reconciliation. Ground truth: expected/steps.json generated by running the gold chain.
